message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant Client
participant TEAPServer
participant MASA

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=Identity

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=Identity

note right of Client
(1)
end note

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TEAP Start,
Authority-ID TLV

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ClientHello)

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ServerHello,
Certificate,
ServerKeyExchange,
CertificateRequest,
ServerHelloDone)

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(Certificate
ClientKeyExchange,
CertificateVerify,
ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished)

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished),
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}

note box
At this stage the outer TLS tunnel is established
The following message exchanges are for BRSKI
end note

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Request-Action TLV:
Status=Failure,
Action=Process-TLV,
TLV=Request-Voucher,
TLV=Trusted-Server-Root,
TLV=CSR-Attributes,
TLV=PKCS#10}

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Request-Voucher TLV}

Client ->> TEAPServer: RequestVoucher

TEAPServer ->> MASA: Voucher

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Voucher TLV}

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{Trusted-Server-Root TLV}

TEAPServer ->> Client: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,{CSR-Attributes TLV}

Client ->> TEAPServer: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
{CSR-Attributes TLV}

@enduml
